textByHash.421f63a38aa8dd3eb0e40f391da4735011e0088a: They say the Final Dawn is inevitable. It's the end that we can't escape from. It's a scary thought, but the Twilight Emissaries have embraced it, so I have as well.
textByHash.760f4a69350d0c75f1f234b06db1260bf80ef07a: I've never been one for proper worship, but I believe in the teachings of Ralos and Ranul. I hope those teachings guide me through whatever is to come.
textByHash.9fc670249411451b0b5e886535e0a39d3af4d4bf: To be honest, I wasn't too sure about joining at first. My friend convinced me though. Here we're part of something bigger than ourselves.
textByHash.d95cb6aca048b74d96f2ce6682a5208ba15d5354: They say the Final Dawn is inevitable. It's the end that we can't escape from. It's a scary thought, but at least here I have a chance to control my destiny and obtain a place in Mictl.
textByHash.f3750d5111b46a2d8695d76290a87eb58ab287d0: To be honest, I wasn't too sure about joining at first. My friend convinced me though. Here we have a chance to be granted a place in Mictl.
